title: Replace multiline string concatenation with text blocks
description: Concatenating multiple string literals with '+' for multiline strings is error-prone and hard to maintain. Java 15 introduced text blocks, which make multiline strings more readable and less likely to contain mistakes. Use text blocks instead of concatenation for multiline strings.
recommendation: Replace multiline string concatenation with a text block for better readability and maintainability.

checks.message: Replace multiline string concatenation with a text block for better readability and maintainability.
